specific_question: How much did growth did MediConn Solutions experience after implementing SEO for their virtual healthcare website?
answer: MediConn Solutions first implemented dedicated SEO (search engine optimization) on their virtual healthcare website in September 2022. As of the end of January 2025, MediConn Solutions' business has grown by 62%, according to the company's annual report.
dr_question: The WTT Solution article from March 2025 indicates that Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending in the healthcare industry. How can MediConn Solutions leverage this software to drive the growth of its healthcare services, using patient benefits from the software as a key to increased business by the year 2028?
